title: Full Stack Developer
description: Our core belief at Fugo is that our potential grows with our team. With each new team member, we ensure that we have moved a step forward towards creating the highest quality mobile games possible. We build the internal platforms that power our games — the analytics, reporting, live-ops, and level-design tools our game, data, and marketing teams rely on every day. This is a junior role with real breadth. You'll work across the whole stack: shipping a React dashboard one day, writing a BigQuery query or wiring up a backend API the next — learning frontend, backend, and data engineering side by side, with plenty of support and room to grow. If you like owning a feature end to end, from the SQL that pulls the numbers to the button the user clicks, you'll fit right in. Desired Skills and Experience: A solid programming foundation — from a CS/related degree, a bootcamp, internships, or serious personal projects. Familiarity with at least one modern language (Python, JavaScript/TypeScript, or similar) and genuine eagerness to work full-stack. Basic SQL and a real interest in working with data. A general understanding of how web apps fit together — frontend, backend/API, and database. Curiosity and a fast learning curve: you're excited to grow across frontend, backend, and data rather than specialize too early. Clear communication and care for quality — in your code and in the tools you build for non-technical users. What you will do: Build and maintain full-stack features — React + TypeScript on the front, Python + FastAPI on the back. Write analytical queries over BigQuery: player behavior, level economy, funnels, retention, monetization. Build data pipelines and scheduled jobs that pull from many sources (GA4, Firebase/Crashlytics, MySQL, ad networks, app-store APIs) and turn them into dashboards and reports. Turn questions from game and marketing teams into practical, self-serve tools: interactive reports, visualizations, dashboards, editors. Integrate internal and third-party APIs. Grow into owning features end to end — design, build, ship, iterate. Nice to have: Hands-on React, TypeScript, or Python Coursework or projects involving SQL, databases, or data analysis Comfort with Git and exposure to a cloud platform (Google Cloud or AWS) Interest in mobile games or product analytics (funnels, retention, LTV) Curiosity about LLM / AI tooling What you can expect from us: Being a part of a passionate team Opportunity to take initiative and bring new ideas Enjoy coming to work every day and to have delightful stories to tell your family and friends

title: Senior Backend Software Engineer
description: Doktar Technologies is an agritech company with offices in Istanbul, Izmir, and the Netherlands, aiming to improve food systems through the intensive use of data and data-driven decisions. To fulfill its purpose, Doktar delivers a palette of digital services to the entire agricultural value chain. Doktar is positioned as a one-stop shop for digital agriculture solutions, developing and delivering a set of services based on emerging technologies, such as remote sensing, the Internet of Things, machine learning, and artificial intelligence. For our growing Software Development Team we are looking for an experienced Senior Backend Software Engineer. You’ll be working to build and maintain a leading agriculture tech platform using modern technologies on cloud and your software craftsmanship. You will have the opportunity to grow professionally, both in technical and methodological aspects, expand your knowledge and skills, and develop into a true craftsman. You will have the chance to learn from experts and mentor others on the team to help foster team growth. Responsibilities Design and build frontends and backend services, applying craftsmanship such as good Design Patterns, Testing, and considering performance, stability & durability at scale. Solve complex problems with solutions that are simple and clear. Help create architecture of new products. Maintain backend services and product frontends. Provide technical feedback to cross-functional stakeholders. Continuously assist in planning and provide updates on the progress of development work. Mentor and assist others in the team. To be a good fit for the role, you need to Understand and apply common Design Patterns. Prioritize quality and incorporate testing into your work. Quickly grasp complex concepts. Be an effective communicator. Be open to feedback and personal growth. Prioritize documentation as a core behavior. Requirements Minimum of 5 years of development experience. Mastered in C#/.NET. Strong understanding of Object-Oriented Programming. Experience with development collaboration methods and tools (such as Scrum, Git, GitHub, Issue Managers, Slack, Teams, etc.). Built and maintained high-demand APIs using Rest or GraphQL. Built on Cloud platforms, particularly Azure. Practical experience with written and spoken English. You will have stronger chances if you Worked with Big Data. Worked with the Serverless Paradigm. Built using microservices architecture. Followed IaaC approach. Developed for mobile backends. Understands the challenges of frontend development. Experience with testing, caching, No-SQL data stores, code-first development, and migrations. Experience with GitHub Actions or Azure DevOps. Familiarity with Node.js. Utilized Swagger, ReDoc, MkDocs, etc., for API documentation. What we offer Career acceleration with mentorship from industry experts and opportunities to lead technical initiatives. The chance to make a meaningful impact on the agriculture industry with contributions to a leading agri-tech platform. Mastery of technical skills on cloud, and the practice of modern software development in a developer-friendly environment. Collaboration on projects with national and international reach in a dynamic, open, and supportive team environment. Flexible work arrangements (hybrid Istanbul/hybrid Izmir or remote). Company shares options. Annual performance bonuses. Private health insurance that also covers junior family members. Lunch and transportation allowances.

title: AI - Native Full Stack Developer
description: AI-Native Full Stack Developer At Panteon, we are looking for Full Stack Developer teammates who strive for continuous self-improvement, radiate high energy, and have truly integrated AI tools into their production workflow. What We Expect? Enthusiasm for developing a high-traffic Business Intelligence (BI) tool that manages data across multiple applications. Full contribution to the creative process. An entrepreneurial mindset, high energy, motivation, and a strong sense of ownership. Being an excellent team player. Ability to work fast and efficiently. At least 3 years of professional work experience in this field. Ability to find fast and effective solutions to challenging problems. Proficiency in JavaScript. Knowledge and experience in NodeJS and React. Experience with database systems such as PostgreSQL, Redis, etc. Knowledge and experience with Amazon Web Services (AWS) or similar cloud services. Advanced level of English. Daily production experience with AI-assisted development tools (Claude Code, Cursor, etc.) — we are looking for genuine usage habits, not just familiarity with the names. Ability to critically review AI output — never merging code without understanding it and questioning why a specific suggestion was made. Making your thought process visible while working with AI; ability to explain the reasoning behind decisions. Clarity and context management in prompt engineering; knowing how to ask the right questions the right way. What Will You Do? Work as part of our team in collaboration with Marketing and Game Design teams. Take part in the development process of a high-traffic BI tool. Ensure requirements are implemented effectively. Write error-free and sustainable code. Actively use AI tools in your daily development process — how you use them, when you use them, and what you choose to do yourself is important to us. Take responsibility for the quality and accuracy of the generated code; AI is the tool, you are the engineer. Work hard, learn a lot, and have plenty of fun with the team. What Will You Learn? Develop your skills by working on a scalable server architecture capable of handling high user volumes. Learn to process Big Data with high performance. Gain experience by tackling challenging problems. Master team collaboration, collective action, and knowledge sharing. Understand how AI tools are used within a real product team — which decisions are made by AI and where human judgment is mandatory. Practice making secure, sustainable changes in large codebases using AI and understanding its limitations. What We Offer? A comprehensive meal card covering all your food expenses. Private health insurance package. Subscriptions for Netflix, YouTube, Spotify, or Exxen. Fun company events and organizations. A strong team and work culture. The experience of working at one of the most established firms in the industry. If you want to be a part of our team, you can send us your CV.

title: Software Engineer (Backend)
description: The digital entertainment and iGaming world is entering a new era, driven by rapidly evolving technology and changing user expectations. This shift demands not only strong brands, but also integrated structures capable of leading them under a unified strategy. This is the vision that inspired the creation of NGAMING. Established in 2026 under Doğan Online (DOL), NGAMING is a next-generation group structure bringing together leading brands in digital entertainment and iGaming under one shared mission and strategy. We built NGAMING to be integrated, sustainable, and collectively stronger, enabling brands to grow not individually, but together. Today, through Nesine, atyarışı.com and Liderform, we move forward not only with our individual achievements but as an integrated structure aligned around a common goal. The driving force behind this vision in technology and software is our company, D Yazılım Teknoloji A.Ş. Join a team full of life and become an essential player! Create groundbreaking projects, build new digital worlds, and make your mark! Surprise your competitors with strategic moves, inspire with your speed, and always pass the ball to your team! If you're looking for a tech-driven, innovative, and exciting career where every moment is full of energy and opportunity, you're in the right place. Join NGAMING — and rewrite the game! Full-of-Life Qualities Bachelor’s degree in Computer Engineering or related fields, Minimum 5+ years experience in software development, Solid knowledge of Asp.NET & Asp.NET Core, C#, MVC, Web API, REST and SOAP services on multi-layered and distributed architectures, Experience with JavaScript, Node.js knowledge is a plus, Experience using RDBMS (MsSQL) required and NOSQL (Mongo) is a plus, Strong knowledge on OOP, Design Patterns, Test Driven Development and Unit Testing, Knowledge of distributed message bus technologies like RabbitMQ, Kafka or similar, Knowledge and experience on Docker & Kubernetes is a plus, Experience in the implementation of microservice architectures, Able to successfully work in Scrum team environment, Strong communication, team working and problem-solving skills with a keen attention to detail. A Full Look on the Job Description As a scrum team member, you will be responsible for development and maintenance processes of software projects, Creating high quality code and writing maintainable unit tests, Continuously improving and applying technical skills on various platforms, Researching and developing new technologies, Build high performance backends that will reach millions of users. Full-of-Life Benefits: “Employee benefits” but it’s also known as “Full-of-Life Benefits” in the world of NGAMING🙂 Private health insurance with unlimited coverage extending to spouse and children, A multinet restaurant ticket, Transportation benefits on office working days, In addition to annual leave days, you have three Won’t Make It Today 🙂 days, which you can use whenever you like (we simply call this BAY 🙂) An additional one-day birthday leave to redeem on any day during your birthday week, Gift vouchers on holidays, Gifts on special occasions, including marriage and child birth, Shop as you wish throughout the year with gift transfers to your Digital Wallet! Follow NGAMING on LinkedIn to discover our high-spirited, full-of-life team! Bu ilan sebebiyle yapacağınız başvurular aracılığıyla toplanacak kişisel verileriniz veri sorumluları NGAMING markası grup şirketleri D Elektronik Şans Oyunları ve Yayıncılık A.Ş., 4 Race Teknoloji ve Yazılım A.Ş., D Yazılım Teknoloji A.Ş., Liderform At Yarışları Enformasyon Anonim Şirketi tarafından 6698 sayılı Kişisel Verilerin Korunması Kanunu ve ilgili mevzuat kapsamında iş başvuru süreçlerinin yürütülmesi amacıyla işlenecektir. Kişisel verilerinize ve haklarınıza ilişkin detaylı bilgi için lütfen Çalışan Adayı Aydınlatma Metnimizi inceleyiniz.
